Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_BRDG_FUKA_STAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5008 0 0}The last Shadow is floating in front of us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not sensing any movement from it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Let's prepare here... then head for battle.[n]{f 1 1}
